Patch Set 1:

This should have a test case, with a check that the MDS version is new enough (>= 2.11.55) to have the fix.

Patch Set 1:

> This should have a test case, with a check that the MDS version is
 > new enough (>= 2.11.55) to have the fix.

Regression test has been there for a while: this is sanity-sec test_17 (and siblings).
But it appears that new_init_ucred() (mdt_lib.c) is only exercised when using Shared-Key. Meaning old_init_ucred() is called instead when nodemap is used without Shared-Key.

Patch Set 1:

> Regression test has been there for a while: this is sanity-sec
 > test_17 (and siblings).

So should this patch make sanity-sec test_17 et.al. be skipped for MDS < 2.11.55?  That would avoid spurious failures when testing against old MDS versions.

Patch Set 1:

> > Regression test has been there for a while: this is sanity-sec
 > > test_17 (and siblings).
 > 
 > So should this patch make sanity-sec test_17 et.al. be skipped for
 > MDS < 2.11.55?  That would avoid spurious failures when testing
 > against old MDS versions.

Done in next patchset.

parents.subject: LU-6142 fld: Fix style issues for fld_request.c

commit.subject: LU-9795 mdt: only set groups if GID is not squashed
commit.message:
LU-9795 mdt: only set groups if GID is not squashed

In new_init_ucred(), only set groups for local client if GID is
not squashed. Otherwise, GID squashing would be by-passed.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec envdefinitions=ONLY="17 18 19 20 21 22",SHARED_KEY=true
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I56961c62a93d99e6a62c72cca7b4fa6e9b3388b9
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/33316
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <jhammond@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
